title: Walking Horses
description: Horses can now walk and sprint
body:
Tired of horses only having one set speed?
This mod will fix that!
If you ride on a horse normally it will just walk at a -70% speed, but it you hold your sprint key while riding they will be faster!
Not only will your horses run while holding the sprint key but they also gain an extra 30% speed boost while riding!

Comes with a configurable file so you can modify the horses how you like.

Report bugs / suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/vrekW2ZPbp)

You can use this in your modpack as long as credit is appropriately given.
